note: Azure Kubernetes Service (AKS) is tracked here as the self-hosted / do-it-yourself (DIY) way to run models, as a contrast to the managed inference APIs (Together AI, Fireworks AI, Tinker API). This dataset is populated automatically by tools/refresh.js from public Hacker News and GitHub mentions. Because 'AKS' alone is an ambiguous acronym, matching is anchored to the full product name 'Azure Kubernetes Service' and related identifiers (the Azure/AKS GitHub repo, 'AKS cluster', 'AKS node pool', 'managed kubernetes'), and machine-generated CI/telemetry posts are filtered out. Auto-collected items are unverified keyword-heuristic guesses.
